caveats: Theme attribution uses full revaluation position impacts plus existing synthetic position tags/classifications.
This artifact supersedes legacy proof impact views only for the single full-revaluation scenario shown here.
limitations: General theme tags can overlap, so theme values and impacts are gross and should not be summed.
No value-weighted split or thesis primary-bucket assignment is fabricated in this artifact.
Report-ready additive thesis buckets require published position-thesis assignments.

rows.advisor_description: Use when separating economically sensitive public equity exposure from defensive ballast.
caveats: Consumer-demand mapping is a synthetic proxy, not a macro forecast.

rows.advisor_description: Use when discussing liquidity, cash generation, and stabilizing portfolio roles.
caveats: Cash generation is not a guaranteed income stream.

rows.advisor_description: Use when explaining how much of the portfolio is connected to the AI buildout.
caveats: Synthetic mapping only; not a security-level research taxonomy.

rows.advisor_description: Use when connecting supply-chain disruption risk to technology and AI infrastructure exposure.
Use when distinguishing direct AI software/chip exposure from physical infrastructure exposure.
caveats: Synthetic demo does not model project-level development risk.

rows.advisor_description: Use when asking whether credit risk is concentrated across income and private-market allocations.
caveats: Credit stress is inferred from synthetic tags and scenario hints.

rows.advisor_description: Use when identifying whether rate sensitivity is specifically duration-driven.
caveats: Duration is inferred from synthetic scenario hints rather than key-rate analytics.

rows.advisor_description: Use when framing where the portfolio may be most exposed to rate moves.
caveats: Does not model full yield-curve construction.

rows.advisor_description: Use when discussing whether the portfolio has assets that may offset inflation pressure.
caveats: Inflation-hedge behavior is simplified and scenario-dependent.

rows.advisor_description: Use when connecting energy supply conditions to portfolio exposures.
caveats: Energy-security mapping is synthetic and not commodity research.

rows.advisor_description: Use when separating USD liquidity and currency effects from broader asset allocation.
caveats: Currency exposure is simplified in the synthetic fixture.

rows.advisor_description: Use when discussing liquidity, valuation confidence, or private-market stress.
caveats: Private marks may be stale or proxy-based in the synthetic fixtures.
